name: agentic-coding-os-brain
description: A public, privacy-first cognitive harness for Codex: global hooks, working context, verification gates, and a local dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-os-brain.mjs && node --check runtime/scripts/inject-context.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/global-hook-status.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/agentic-dispatch.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/engineering-harness.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/capture-session.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/privacy-scan.cjs && node --check runtime/dashboard/dashboard-server.mjs && npm run evolution:apply -- --example && npm run dashboard:control -- --example && npm run tool:eval && npm run budget:enforce -- --example && npm run agent:lock -- --example && npm run agent:execution -- --example && node --check runtime/scripts/evolution-apply.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/dashboard-control-plane.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/tool-eval-suite.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/token-budget-enforcer.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/agent-permission-lock.cjs && node --check runtime/scripts/agent-execution-ledger.cjs && npm run privacy:scan && node test/smoke.mjs
